title: Someone is enrolling in an AI course every 3 seconds on Coursera, says CEO
description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping the global skills landscape, prompting both individuals and enterprises to seek specialised training. Coursera CEO Greg Hart said the company is embedding AI tools into learning workflows and sees verified assessments and proof of mastery as key differentiators as demand for AI education continues to surge.

title: Silicon Valley's new formula: More AI, fewer employees
description: Companies are pouring billions into artificial intelligence while trimming payrolls, signalling a major shift in how work is organised across the technology sector and raising fresh concerns about the future of white-collar jobs.
content: Tech layoffs have climbed to their highest level in nearly two years, with more than 1.16 lakh employees losing their jobs in the first five months of 2026 as companies accelerate investments in artificial intelligence and automation. Industry tracke... [2315 chars]

title: Global investors pull $8.5 billion from India funds in 2026 as money chases AI trade
description: India-focused funds have seen $8.5 billion of outflows so far this year as global investors shift money into AI-linked markets such as South Korea, Taiwan and the US, according to a report by Elara Securities. The brokerage says capital is increasingly concentrating in direct beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence boom.

title: SpaceX bankers prepare for potential $20 billion bond offering
description: SPACEX’S bankers are preparing to meet investors as early as next week to discuss a bond offering of at least $20 billion, two sources familiar with the matter said on Thursday, as Elon Musk’s newly public company seeks funding for an ambitious and capital-intensive artificial intelligence (AI) expansion.

title: Reliance Intelligence set to disrupt AI economics: Akash Ambani
description: In August, Reliance Industries launched Reliance Intelligence, a fully-owned division to advance artificial intelligence in India.
content:
Reliance Jio Infocomm Ltd (RJIL) Chairman Akash Ambani on Friday said that Reliance Intelligence will disrupt AI economics by making it significantly more affordable for every Indian by the end of the decade, just like Jio made data affordable.

title: Military response to a cyberattack?
description: “We have entered a period of global disorder, with illiberal regimes gaining ground and the old structures of international order breaking down.
